name: Found cash
description: You found a $20 note on Eastern Avenue. Lucky day!

name: Generous tip
description: A regular at the cafe slipped you a $15 tip.

name: Free Manning Bar pizza
description: USU event with free food — you ate well today.

name: Assignment extension
description: Your tutor pushed the deadline back a week. Breathing room!

name: Team carried you
description: Your INFO6007 group did most of the work this week. Sus, but nice.

name: USYD merch giveaway
description: You scored a free hoodie. Great for winter all-nighters.

name: Professor noticed you
description: Your COMP9001 lecturer praised your forum post in front of the class.

name: Sunny day at the Quad
description: You took a break in the Quadrangle. Felt human again.

name: Eureka moment
description: A confusing COMP9601 concept finally clicked at 2am.

name: Library buddy
description: You befriended a study partner at Fisher Library.

name: T1 train delay
description: Sydney Trains failed you again. You missed your morning lecture.

name: Group project ghost
description: A teammate vanished — you're carrying the team now.

name: IGA price hike
description: Groceries cost an arm and a leg this week.

name: Lost wallet
description: You dropped your wallet somewhere in Newtown. Gone.

name: Library aircon cold
description: Fisher's aircon got you. You're sniffling all day.

name: Phone died mid-revision
description: Your phone died with all your study notes on it.

name: Internet outage at submission
description: Your wifi died at 11:50pm. You had to dash to the library.

name: Noisy flatmate
description: Your flatmate had a party. Sleep was not a priority for them.

name: Harsh feedback
description: Your tutor's comments stung. Your COMP9120 mark fell short.

name: Food poisoning
description: The Wentworth food court got you. You'll be in bed today.

name: Bills due
description: Phone + transport top-up + electricity all hit at once.

name: Rent increase notice
description: Your landlord raised the weekly rent. Sydney living, baby.

name: Brain booster pills?
description: Someone in the postgrad lounge offers a 'study aid'. It's not legal.

name: Lotto stand outside the station
description: A lotto stand on King St catches your eye. You feel lucky.

name: RA invitation
description: A professor noticed your work and invites you to her research lab.

name: Scholarship application open
description: Faculty announces a scholarship — your average looks competitive.

name: Bus replacement service
description: Trackwork. The bus replacement service tested your soul.

name: Extra shift offered
description: Your manager offered a weekend shift. Easy money.

name: Newtown night out
description: Friends drag you to King St for dinner.

name: USYD Sport gym
description: You hit the campus gym. Felt great.
